page_metadata.biotools__summary: The Database of Macromolecular Movements (MolMovDB) contains a collection of animated protein and RNA structures to assist in the exploration of macromolecular flexibility. Software for structure analysis is also available.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The Database of Macromolecular Movements (MolMovDB) contains a collection of animated protein and RNA structures to assist in the exploration of macromolecular flexibility. Software for structure analysis is also available.
